articles.title: Building Cinematic Web Experiences
articles.excerpt: How to create immersive web experiences with smooth animations that captivate your audience.

articles.title: The Art of Modern Web Design
articles.excerpt: Exploring trends in digital design and interactions that shape the web today.

articles.title: Creative Development Workflow
articles.excerpt: Tools and techniques for creative developers to build amazing experiences.
articles.content:
## The Stack

Every creative developer needs the right tools:

- **Framework**: Next.js 16
- **Animation**: Framer Motion
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS v4
- **3D**: Three.js / React Three Fiber

## Workflow Tips

1. Prototype fast
2. Iterate on animations
3. Test on real devices
4. Optimize for performance

## Best Practices

- Use native CSS animations where possible
- Profile your animations
- Test with actual devices
